titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 5970

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=598 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 20:57:31.490579+00 | translation moa=599 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 20:57:31.52489+00

p.cl:
Sciant omnes tam presentes quam futuri quod Ego Iohannes de Neuilla . dedi . concessi . et hac presenti carta confirmaui Roberto Gocelin cognato
meo pro homagio et seruicio suo vnam Bouatam terre in territorio de prendergest de terra defensabili . Illam . Scilicet . Bouatam terre uersus
orientem quam aldanus filius Waldeui tenuit . et quindecim acras de dominico meo . Scilicet . ad thornedales sex acras . ad Bakestanesrig
duas acras et dimidiam . et ad Crumbedales . . tres acras et dimidiam . ad shortlandes . vnam acram et dimidiam . ad lillesacre vnam
acram . et ad Crumbedales vnam dimidiam acram . Tenendas et habendas dicto Roberto et heredibus suis uel eorum assignatis de me et heredibus
meis in feodo et hereditate Libere et quiete cum omnibus Libertatibus et aysiamentis dicte terre pertinentibus . Reddendo inde annuatim ipse
et heredes sui uel eorum assignati michi et heredibus meis pro dictis quindecim acris quasdam albas Cyrotekas ad pentecosten pro omni seruicio ad me uel heredes meos pertinente . et faciendo pro predicta Bouata terre defensabili quantum pertinet ad unam bouatam terre
de eodem tenemento ad seruicium domini Regis et domus de Coldingham . Dabunt etiam ipse Robertus et heredes sui uel eorum assignati michi
et heredibus meis pro forisfacto cum inciderit . duodecim denarii et de releuamine duodecim denarii . Ego uero Iohannes et heredes mei omnes
terras prenominatas cum omnibus pertinentiis suis et Libertatibus prescriptis dicto Roberto et heredibus suis et eorum assignatis . contra . omnes homines et feminas
in perpetuum defendemus et warantizabimus . Et sciendum est quod hec est prima terra quam dedi uel alienaui priusquam fui dominus terre mee de
prendergest .
In cuius rei testimonium presenti scripto sigillum meum apposui .

Testibus . domino . A . priore de Coldingham . domino
hnr' terrario . domino . A . de prendergest . Thom' de Neseb' . Willelmo vicar' de Aldekambus . Willelmo de Scremerston' . Iohanne filio
Elie . Ada . filio eius . Ric' de prendergest . Bertramo de reston' . Roberto filio gregorio . Roberto filio Mauricii . et Multis Aliis .
Let all present as well as future know that

I, John Neville, have given, granted, and by this present charter made firm to Robert Goscelin, my kinsman, in return for his homage and service, one oxgang of land in the territory of Prenderguest from the fortified land, namely the oxgang of land towards the east which Haldane son of Waldef held, and fifteen acres of my demesne, that is, six acres at Thorndales, two and a half acres at Bakestanesrig, and three and a half acres at Crumbedales, one and a half acres at Shortlands, one acre at Lillesacre, and a half-acre at Crumbedales. For the said Robert and his heirs or assigns to hold and to have of me and my heirs in feu and heritage, freely and quitely, with all liberties and easements belonging to the said land; by him and his heirs or assignees yearly rendering to me and my heirs thereupon in return for the said fifteen acres some white gloves at Pentecost for every service pertaining to me or my heirs, and performing for the said oxgang of fortified land as much as pertains to one oxgang of land of the same holding to the service of the lord king and the house of Coldingham. Robert himself and his heirs or assigns shall also give to me and my heirs, in return for a fine, should it occur, twelve pence, and for relief, twelve pence. And I, John, and my heirs shall defend and warrant all the aforenamed land with all their pertinents and aforewritten liberties to the said Robert and his heirs and their assigns against all men and women for ever. And it should be known that this is the first land which I have given or alienated since I became lord of my land of Prenderguest.
As witness of this matter I have applied my seal to the present document.

As witnesses, the lord Anketin, prior of Coldingham, the lord Henry the terrar, the lord Adam of Prenderguest, Thomas of Nisbet, William vicar of Oldcambus, William of Scremerston, John son of Elias, Adam his son, Richard of Prenderguest, Bertram of Reston, Robert son of Gregory, Robert son of Maurice, and many others.
